stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
During a VFR flight, the Pilot after some time finds him/herself overflying a lighted obstacle that was not intended to be directly overflown. What does this indicate about the actual flight conditions?

options.a: The northerly wind is stronger than expected.
options.b: The southerly wind is stronger than expected.
options.c: The aircraft is flying at a faster ground speed than expected.
options.d: The aircraft is flying at a slower ground speed than expected.
